command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && git pull --ff-only && git add kai/MAINTENANCE_SPEC.md kai/WORKFLOW_SYSTEMS.md kai/launchd/ kai/memory/ bin/business-monitor.sh bin/escalate-blocked.sh bin/memory-compact.sh bin/ticket.sh && git commit -m 'ship: scheduled maintenance system v1.0 — 15m/30m/1h/nightly cycles

Implements MAINTENANCE_SPEC.md (from counterpart research session):

Maintenance scripts:
- bin/business-monitor.sh: 30-min ticket queue + newsletter + feed freshness
- bin/escalate-blocked.sh: hourly blocked ticket SLA enforcement
- bin/memory-compact.sh: 02:30 AM daily note archive, log rotation, ticket archive
- healthcheck.sh: already had 15-min cycle, now includes ticket SLA (Check 9)

launchd plists (kai/launchd/):
- com.hyo.healthcheck: every 15 min
- com.hyo.business-monitor: every 30 min
- com.hyo.escalate-blocked: every hour
- com.hyo.memory-compact: 02:30 AM MTN
- install.sh: one-command deployment to Mini

Memory system (kai/memory/):
- daily/: Layer 2 event notes (written live by monitors)
- agent_memory/: per-agent lessons (written on ticket close)
- patterns/: pattern library (3+ occurrences become rules)

Ticket close now triggers:
- Git commit with ticket ID in message (audit trail)
- Agent memory write (lesson learned)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>' && git push origin main 2>&1
